mnemonics.title: FIFO Order
mnemonics.content: First In, First Out - like a queue: the first page that came in is the first to go out

mnemonics.title: OPTimal Future
mnemonics.content: OPTimal looks to the Future - it replaces the page that won't be used for the longest time

mnemonics.title: LRU Past
mnemonics.content: Least Recently Used looks to the Past - it replaces the page not used for the longest time

mnemonics.title: Clock Hands
mnemonics.content: Clock algorithm goes around in a circle like clock hands, giving pages a second chance
